# AVProposal

> AI-powered AV proposal generator for audio/visual professionals. Create, preview, and download polished client proposals in minutes.

AVProposal lets AV integrators and consultants build branded proposals through a guided form, see a live preview, and export a professional PDF — all in the browser. A built-in blog publishes guides and insights for the AV industry.

## Product

- [Home](https://avproposal.com/): Landing page with features and how-it-works overview
- [Sign In](https://avproposal.com/auth?tab=login): User login
- [Register](https://avproposal.com/auth?tab=register): Create a free account
- [Proposal Builder](https://avproposal.com/proposal): Form + live preview + PDF export (requires login)
- [Blog](https://avproposal.com/blog): AV industry guides and product updates

## Features

- Guided proposal form: client info, venue details, room-by-room equipment lists
- Live side-by-side PDF preview rendered in the browser
- One-click PDF download (html2canvas + jsPDF, A4 multi-page)
- Company logo upload (stored on Cloudflare R2 CDN)
- Daily download limit on free tier with upgrade prompt
- Blog with rich HTML/CSS posts managed by admins

## Tech stack

- Next.js 14 (App Router, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS)
- Supabase (authentication + database)
- Cloudflare R2 (logo and image storage)
- Vercel (hosting, auto-deploys from GitHub)

## Blog

Individual blog posts are available at `/blog/[slug]`. Each post is authored in HTML/CSS by admins and rendered in a sandboxed iframe.

## Optional

- [Sitemap](https://avproposal.com/sitemap.xml)
